clear_overrides.name: Clear overrides
clear_overrides.description: Return the inverter to self-use mode, clearing all or selected overrides.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Only clear overrides of this mode. If not set, all overrides are cleared.

feedin.name: Feed-in
feedin.description: Prioritise feeding excess solar to the grid for a set duration, optionally at a specific time and power limit.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: How long to feed in (max 4 hours, must not cross midnight).

power.name: Power limit
power.description: Feed-in power limit in watts. Defaults to inverter rated power if not set.

start_time.name: Start time
start_time.description: Time of day to start the override. Defaults to now if not set.

replace_conflicts.name: Remove conflicting overrides instead of aborting
replace_conflicts.description: If enabled, silently remove any existing overrides that overlap with the new time window instead of aborting.

force_charge.name: Force charge
force_charge.description: Charge the battery for a set duration, optionally at a specific time and power limit. The inverter automatically reverts to self-use when the window ends.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: How long to force charge (max 4 hours, must not cross midnight).

power.name: Power limit
power.description: Charge power limit in watts. Defaults to inverter rated power if not set.

start_time.name: Start time
start_time.description: Time of day to start the override. Defaults to now if not set.

replace_conflicts.name: Remove conflicting overrides instead of aborting
replace_conflicts.description: If enabled, silently remove any existing overrides that overlap with the new time window instead of aborting.

force_discharge.name: Force discharge
force_discharge.description: Discharge the battery for a set duration, optionally at a specific time and power limit. The inverter automatically reverts to self-use when the window ends.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: How long to force discharge (max 4 hours, must not cross midnight).

power.name: Power limit
power.description: Discharge power limit in watts. Defaults to inverter rated power if not set.

start_time.name: Start time
start_time.description: Time of day to start the override. Defaults to now if not set.

replace_conflicts.name: Remove conflicting overrides instead of aborting
replace_conflicts.description: If enabled, silently remove any existing overrides that overlap with the new time window instead of aborting.

smart_charge.name: Smart charge
smart_charge.description: Charge the battery within a time window, pacing the charge rate to reach a target SoC by the end of the interval. Charging may start late if the target can be reached in less time.

start_time.name: Start time
start_time.description: Time of day to start charging.

end_time.name: End time
end_time.description: Time of day to stop charging. Must be after start time, within 4 hours.

target_soc.name: Target SoC
target_soc.description: Charge the battery to this SoC level. Charging stops and reverts to self-use when reached.

power.name: Maximum power
power.description: Maximum charge power in watts. The actual power may be lower to pace charging to the end of the window.

replace_conflicts.name: Remove conflicting overrides instead of aborting
replace_conflicts.description: If enabled, silently remove any existing overrides that overlap with the new time window instead of aborting.

smart_discharge.name: Smart discharge
smart_discharge.description: Discharge the battery within a time window. Stays in self-use as long as possible, then switches to forced discharge at full power when needed to meet the target by the window end. Reverts to self-use when the minimum SoC or feed-in energy limit is reached.

start_time.name: Start time
start_time.description: Time of day to start discharging.

end_time.name: End time
end_time.description: Time of day to stop discharging. Must be after start time, within 4 hours.

power.name: Power limit
power.description: Discharge power limit in watts. Defaults to inverter rated power if not set.

min_soc.name: Minimum SoC to stop discharge
min_soc.description: Stop discharging and revert to self-use when the battery reaches this level.

feedin_energy_limit_kwh.name: Feed-in energy limit
feedin_energy_limit_kwh.description: Stop discharging after this much energy (kWh) has been fed into the grid, beyond household self-consumption.

replace_conflicts.name: Remove conflicting overrides instead of aborting
replace_conflicts.description: If enabled, silently remove any existing overrides that overlap with the new time window instead of aborting.

user.title: FoxESS Control
user.description: Enter your FoxESS Cloud API credentials.

web_credentials.title: Real-Time Data (Optional)
web_credentials.description: Provide your FoxESS Cloud web login for ~5-second real-time data during forced discharge. This reduces the risk of accidental grid import from load spikes. Leave blank to use standard 5-minute polling. You may enter your password or its MD5 hash.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to FoxESS Cloud API. Check your network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your API key and device serial number.
error.web_auth_failed: Web portal login failed. Check your username and password.
error.ws_connect_failed: Could not establish a WebSocket connection. Login succeeded but the real-time stream is unavailable.

data.min_power_change: Minimum Power Change for Smart Charge (W)
data.api_min_soc: Minimum API fdSoc (%) — ⚠️ Values below 11 may not work with all firmware versions

modbus.title: foxess_modbus Entity Mapping
modbus.description: foxess_modbus detected. Entities have been auto-detected — adjust if needed. Clear all fields to use cloud API instead.

unmanaged_work_mode.title: Unmanaged work mode detected
unmanaged_work_mode.description:
The inverter schedule contains a **{work_mode}** group ({time_range}) which is not managed by this integration. FoxESS Control expects Self Use as the default work mode and will not modify the schedule while an unmanaged mode is present.

Please remove the '{work_mode}' schedule group via the FoxESS app, then retry the operation.

session_aborted.title: Smart {session_type} session aborted
session_aborted.description:
The smart {session_type} session was aborted: {reason}.

The inverter has been reverted to Self Use mode.
